creator: freebsd@bengrimm.net
text:
The list of ports running behind because binutils won't build is steadily growing:

mail/mailscanner                   ?   orphaned: mail/mailscanner
archivers/arj                      ?   orphaned: archivers/arj
security/clamav                    ?   orphaned: security/clamav
mail/p5-Mail-IMAPClient            ?   orphaned: mail/p5-Mail-IMAPClient
mail/spamassassin                  ?   orphaned: mail/spamassassin

Is there anything I can do or test?
